auditor.firm_name: Not captured from text layer — in letterhead graphic on p.85-87

content.formation: Formed March 17, 2021 as a Washington limited liability company
content.license_agreement: Non-exclusive license agreement dated January 4, 2022 between Company and Licensor
content.business: Sell franchises for hotel facilities under Magnuson name and system
content.liability_shield: LLC — member not liable for debts/obligations unless specific guarantee signed

sub_policies.use_of_estimates: Standard — management estimates may differ from actual

accounts_receivable.method: Expected collection amount; collective assessment by risk characteristics
accounts_receivable.allowance_for_doubtful_accounts: None required as of Dec 31, 2024 and 2023
accounts_receivable.write_off_policy: Written off when all collection efforts exhausted

franchise_fees.primary_performance_obligation: Granting rights to IP + pre-opening activities
franchise_fees.asu_2021_02_treatment: Pre-opening activities under ASU 2021-02 recognized as single performance obligation
franchise_fees.non_brand_specific_pre_opening: If distinct from IP, accounted as separate performance obligation
franchise_fees.allocation_method: Adjusted market assessment approach for stand-alone selling price of pre-opening activities; residual to IP access right
franchise_fees.timing: Franchise fees allocated to IP access recognized over time

continuing_fees.basis: Percentage of franchisee gross sales (sales-based continuing fees)
continuing_fees.recognition: Recognized as franchisee sales occur and fee deemed collectible
continuing_fees.rationale: Entirely related to use of Company's IP

revenue_recognition.other_revenues: Recognized as single performance obligation when services rendered

incremental_costs_of_obtaining_contract.policy: Capitalize direct and incremental costs (principally commissions) and amortize over franchise agreement term

income_taxes.status: Disregarded entity for income tax purposes (single-member LLC)
income_taxes.provision: No provision for income taxes — all items pass through to member's return

subsequent_events.material_events: None requiring recognition or additional disclosure

content.disaggregation: By timing of recognition and type of revenue
content.geographic_risk: Revenues dependent on US economy strength and collectibility
content.note: All franchise fee revenue in 2022 was recognized point-in-time; no over-time recognition in any period

license_agreement.rights_granted: Right to sell Magnuson franchises and earn franchise fees, continuing fees, and other fees
license_agreement.license_fee: Mutually determined; NO license fee expense in 2024, 2023, or 2022

management_fee.description: Administrative services performed by Licensor on Company's behalf

families_not_present: Deferred franchise fees (all recognized point-in-time in 2022; none deferred)
